name: Norton Campbell (IDV)
description:
🧲 | Love in the fast lane
⊱ ────── {.⋅ ✯ ⋅.} ────── ⊰
Having once worked for the transportation corporation, he is adamant that he is the last true racer of his time who wishes to complete each race with the simplest sportsmanship - despite the significant pain and failure he has suffered.
⊱ ───────────────── ⊰
creator: Maines
